lead_profile_text: STL Switch + Sell. 3-bed house, 64 Duncary Road, Bristol BS3 4LA. Tenants have given notice; property also listed for sale with no buyer interest. Unfurnished, modern, underfloor heating, small courtyard garden, street parking only. Currently let at £2,500/month (long-let). Gross STR potential £126,000/year.
emotional_profile: Motivated — genuine transition event (tenants leaving). Technical disruption cut the meeting short before objections or Q&A stage. The sell angle is secondary; no buyer interest makes STR the live option.

Summer timing for setup noted as optimal — received positively
